summary: Exciting Paris show captured on high‑quality DAT‑style audience tape – vibrant performance and clear recording.
review: All three reviewers rave about the October 1990 Paris concert, describing it as one of the loudest, most energetic Dead shows they’ve ever witnessed. The taper’s DAT‑quality audience source is praised for its clarity and lack of audible flaws, making the excitement of the night come through vividly.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent 5‑star reviews highlight an exceptional performance and a clean audience recording; both show and recording quality merit near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Taper’s DAT‑quality tape reported as clear, vibrant, with no noted dropouts or muffiness; captures the live energy well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy throughout, loud and immersive; reviewers felt it was one of the best Dead shows they ever saw.
